title: Dulux 500001 Easycare Bathroom Soft Sheen Emulsion Paint for Walls and Ceilings - Pure Brilliant White 1L
features: • Highly tough moisture and steam resistant paint
• MouldTec formulation protects against mould for 5 years
• 10x tougher than conventional Dulux matt and silk emulsion
description: From the manufacturer Be Inspired Blush Pink is a delicate, flesh toned pink. It adds a soft feminine touch to your room or can be combined with cool greys for a modern crisp effect. Choose this colour if you’d like a warm and friendly space full of light and possibility. Timeless is an ultra-pale cream with a delicate floral feeling. One of our favourites, use this tone where you usually apply white, but want a softer effect and warmer glow in your home. Mineral Mist is a gentle pale blue. Combinations of blue tones and light colours can open up a room and maximise its space. Choose this versatile colour if you’d like to create a light, airy room where you can feel calm and uplifted. Willow Tree is a mid-tone green that has a natural, airy feel. This popular shade brings a feeling of tranquillity to your space.
